_comment: AUTHORITATIVE price list. Every charge is computed from this file on the server; prices shown in the browser (docs/assets/js/commerce/commerce-catalog.js) are display copies. Keep the two files in sync — the browser file decides what the customer SEES, this file decides what they PAY. priceCents is integer US cents. Set purchasable=false to pull a part from checkout without deleting it.
